channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pollster Allocco tells Newsmax that Platner is 'underwater' against Senator Collins
item.description: Maine Democrat Senate candidate Graham Platner's apparent polling lead over incumbent Republican Sen. Susan Collins may be weaker than publicized.

item.title: Second spot called in race for California governor
Criminal case against suspect in fatal beating of 'Trump House' owner placed on hold
Tattoo controversy at Platner town hall highlights a major issue on the left
